SDK Gateway

🔌 Connect Your Services

Grant Heady access to manage your accounts — each provider requests only the permissions you approve

⚙️ Settings

🔐 Data Persistence Model

Choose how Heady stores your data. You own your data — always. Heady structures persistence around security, trust, and sovereignty regardless of which model you choose.

💻

Local Persistence

Maximum Privacy

All data stays on your device. Nothing leaves your machine — zero cloud dependency.

  • ✅ Data never leaves your device — fully air-gapped capable
  • ✅ Zero third-party access — no cloud servers involved
  • ✅ Instant access — no network latency
  • ✅ HIPAA/SOC2 friendly — data at rest only on your hardware
  • ⚠️ Data lost if device is damaged (back up separately)
  • ⚠️ No cross-device sync
🛡️ Security Model

Encrypted at rest using device-level AES-256. Heady stores data using IndexedDB with an encrypted wrapper — keys derived from your local auth credential. No telemetry, no phone-home, no cloud sync.

🔄

Hybrid Persistence

Recommended

Local + Cloud liquid nodes work together. Hot data lives on-device; cold data syncs to encrypted cloud vaults.

  • ✅ Local-first — works offline, syncs when connected
  • ✅ Cross-device sync — access your data from anywhere
  • ✅ Liquid node topology — data flows to nearest edge node
  • ✅ End-to-end encrypted sync — cloud sees only ciphertext
  • ✅ Selective sync — choose what goes to cloud vs stays local
  • ✅ Auto-backup — cloud backup protects against device loss
🛡️ Security Model

Client-side encryption before any data leaves your device. Cloud nodes store only encrypted blobs — Heady servers cannot decrypt your data. Keys are derived from your passphrase using Argon2id and never transmitted. Liquid nodes use zero-knowledge proofs to verify integrity without viewing contents.

☁️

Cloud Persistence

Maximum Access

All data stored in Heady's encrypted cloud infrastructure. Access from any device, any time — zero local storage needed.

  • ✅ Access anywhere — any device, any browser
  • ✅ Automatic backups — geo-redundant across 3 regions
  • ✅ Real-time collaboration — share workspaces with team
  • ✅ No local storage required — perfect for thin clients
  • ✅ Managed infrastructure — automatic scaling and updates
  • ⚠️ Requires internet connection for all operations
🛡️ Security Model

AES-256-GCM encryption at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit. Data stored in SOC2 Type II certified infrastructure. Optional customer-managed encryption keys (CMEK) for enterprise — you hold the master key, we hold the ciphertext. GDPR/CCPA compliant with data residency options.

🌍 Data Sovereignty & Trust

🔑
You Own Your Keys

Encryption keys are derived from your credentials and never stored on Heady servers. In hybrid and cloud modes, we use zero-knowledge architecture — we literally cannot read your data.

🗑️
Right to Deletion

Request full data deletion at any time. All data — local caches, cloud backups, vector embeddings, and audit logs — is purged within 24 hours across all regions.

📦
Full Data Export

Export everything in standard formats (JSON, CSV, Markdown). Your data is portable — take it to any platform, any time. No vendor lock-in.

🔍
Audit Trail

Complete transparency on who accessed what, when. Every data operation is logged and available in your security dashboard. Zero hidden operations.

🏛️
Compliance Ready

GDPR, CCPA, HIPAA, SOC2 Type II, ISO 27001 aligned. Data residency options for EU, US, APAC. Government assistance plan users get equal sovereignty protections.

🤖
AI Training Opt-Out

Your data is never used to train AI models. Period. Not ours, not third-party. Your content remains your intellectual property.

📂 Local Filesystem Access

Grant Heady access to a folder on your device. Heady can organize files, create content, manage code repos, and sync media directly on your filesystem.

📁

Grant Folder Access

Heady gets read/write to the folder you choose — nothing else

  • 🔒 Sandboxed — access only to the folder you explicitly grant
  • 👁️ Transparent — every file operation is logged in your audit trail
  • ⏹️ Revocable — remove access instantly at any time
  • 🔐 No silent modifications — Heady asks before destructive operations
🧠

HeadyBuddy

Connected to Brain
Hey! I'm HeadyBuddy, your AI assistant. I can help you manage services, query memory, run diagnostics, or just chat. What's on your mind?
